reasoning: Adds env-var-driven three-mode branch (cloudflare default / cf-edge-only / disabled) to the existing Cloudflare-Access JWT middleware so the operator's allowlisted Mac IP can reach dashboard.chiefaia.com and ops.chiefaia.com without a sign-in prompt. Defence-in-depth bypass requires three signals: Cf-Ray header (CF-injected, absent on direct-to-origin), Cf-Connecting-Ip in BYPASS_ALLOWED_IPS allow-list, and X-Caia-Edge-Token constant-time-matched against EDGE_SHARED_SECRET (which a Cloudflare WAF Transform Rule sets/overwrites at the edge). Any failure falls through to the strict JWT path. Apps duplicate the middleware + lib/auth/* + lib/tenants/* with explicit REUSE-FIRST EXCEPTION markers; the operator-instructed B-task to extract @chiefaia/wizard-auth is documented in PLAN.md §7. Default-cloudflare behaviour is unchanged byte-for-byte. 50 vitest cases pass across both apps (full mode × JWT × bypass-header matrix).

reuseSearchResults.reason: Does not exist yet on develop. Operator instructed inline duplication with REUSE-FIRST EXCEPTION marker + B-task tracker.
Referenced in AGENTS.md but not shipped. Native fetch is allowlisted.
Wraps secrets-data CRUD, not workspace creation. lib/tenants/infisical.ts keeps the hand-rolled admin client.
Used for Card / Button on both apps' /sign-in pages.
lib/auth/jwks-cache.ts uses createRemoteJWKSet + jwtVerify. Unchanged here.
Constant-time compare in lib/auth/edge-bypass.ts; length mismatch handled before the call to avoid leaking expected length.
lib/tenants/store.ts uses the pg driver directly. @chiefaia/persistence-postgres does not exist.
lib/tenants/wire.ts already routes tenant.provisioned via HybridEventBus. Unchanged here.
